product_overview: A two-stage system that collects YouTube comments and runs a hybrid analysis pipeline (local NLP + LLM) to produce anonymized insights, network distortion detection, and dashboard-ready visualizations. The system exposes collection and analysis services through a unified gateway and REST APIs.
core_goals: Provide reliable collection of YouTube comments and a traceable history of collection tasks.
Perform deterministic preprocessing and anonymization of collected comments and persist cleaned data to an analysis cache (SQLite).
Run a hybrid analysis pipeline combining local NLP (sentiment, toxicity, topic modeling) with selective LLM summarization while enforcing token limits for cost control.
Detect network-driven opinion distortion and provide SNA outputs for visualization and export.
Expose a single-screen SPA dashboard showing status, progress, visualizations, and CSV export; ensure fault tolerance and resumability on failure.

features.name: Unified Gateway
features.description: Single entry point to the system providing the SPA dashboard and routing to collection and analysis services.
user_flows: GET / -> Receive 200 with SPA dashboard HTML/JS and route metadata -> GET /status -> Receive 200 with current collection status

GET /analysis/results -> Receive 404 Not Found due to gateway routing/prefix mismatch (known limitation) -> GET / -> Receive 200 with dashboard and operator guidance to retry or call analysis service directly

features.name: YouTube Comment Collection API
features.description: Manage lifecycle of comment collection tasks: start/stop collection, check running status, and list history.
user_flows: POST /start with JSON body {"video_id":"<video_id>", "options":{...}} -> Receive 202 Accepted with task_id and started status -> GET /status -> Receive 200 with task_id status 'running' -> GET /history -> Receive 200 with entry for task_id and collected count
POST /start with JSON body {"video_id":"invalid_id"} -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error -> POST /stop with JSON body {"task_id":"nonexistent"} -> Receive 404 Not Found

features.name: Data Preprocessing & Anonymization (F-01)
features.description: Trigger preprocessing that normalizes text, removes emojis/special characters/stopwords, hashes authorChannelId with SHA-256, and stores cleaned records into analysis_cache.db.
user_flows: POST /analysis/analyze with JSON body {"action":"preprocess","video_ids":["<video_id>"]} -> Receive 200 with job_id and status 'preprocessing' -> GET /analysis/results?job_id=<job_id> -> Receive 200 with counts, anonymization_report and storage confirmation

POST /analysis/analyze with JSON body {"action":"preprocess","input_path":"1_collection/data/<video_id>/bad_format.csv"} -> Receive 400 Bad Request with error 'malformed CSV' -> GET /analysis/results?job_id=<job_id> -> Receive 404 Not Found

features.name: Hybrid Analysis Pipeline (F-02)
features.description: Run local NLP (sentiment, toxicity, topic modeling) and selectively call LLM (Gemini) on top-scoring items (<=5% of tokens) to produce final summaries and reports.
user_flows: POST /analysis/analyze with JSON body {"mode":"hybrid","video_ids":["<video_id>"],"llm_token_fraction":0.05} -> Receive 200 with job_id and stage 'local_nlp_running' -> GET /analysis/results?job_id=<job_id> -> Receive 200 with sentiment_distribution, topics_topN and llm_summary

POST /analysis/analyze with JSON body {"mode":"hybrid","video_ids":["<video_id>"],"llm_api_key":null} -> Receive 200 with job_id and note 'llm_skipped: true, fallback_to_local:true' -> GET /analysis/results?job_id=<job_id> -> Receive 200 with local_nlp_only results and a flag indicating LLM was skipped due to missing API key

features.name: Distortion Detection & Social Network Analysis (F-03)
features.description: Compute commenter reply networks, activity frequency, cluster detection, and detect repeated/time-windowed distortion patterns or small-account dominance.
user_flows: POST /analysis/analyze with JSON body {"mode":"sna","video_ids":["<video_id>"],"compute_network":true} -> Receive 200 with job_id and 'sna_running' -> GET /analysis/results?job_id=<job_id> -> Receive 200 with network_map (nodes, edges), cluster_metrics and distortion_alerts

POST /analysis/analyze with JSON body {"mode":"sna","video_ids":["<huge_video_id_set>"]} -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable with message 'resource limits reached' -> GET /analysis/results?job_id=<job_id> -> Receive 206 Partial Content with partial network snapshot and 'truncated: true'

features.name: Single-screen Dashboard & Export (F-04)
features.description: SPA that displays real-time status and visualizations (sentiment donut, topic clusters, timeseries), shows analysis progress and allows CSV export of cleaned/annotated data.
user_flows: GET / -> Receive 200 with SPA assets and available job list -> GET /analysis/results?job_id=<job_id> -> Receive 200 with chart-ready payload (sentiment, topics, timeseries) -> GET /analysis/results?job_id=<job_id>&export=csv -> Receive 200 with CSV file stream
GET /analysis/results?job_id=<job_id_in_progress> -> Receive 202 Accepted with progress: 42% -> GET /analysis/results?job_id=<job_id> -> Receive 200 once complete with final payload

features.name: Unified Gateway
features.description: Single entry point for both collection and analysis services.

features.name: YouTube Comment Collection API
features.description: Manages the collection of comments from YouTube videos.

endpoints.description: Start the comment collection process (JSON Body).

known_limitations.impact: Requires path prefix update for analysis calls
